Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CINDY TREMBLAY-SHIPWAY's Motion To Quash Subpoenas is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoenas are limited as the requests for body index treatment, neuromuscular diseases and acupuncture treatment are ordered stricken. The time period of the subpoenas is limited to January 2005 to present. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Crown Building Maintenance Co. dba Able Legacy Partners Commercial, Inc.'s Motion to Remove Case From Arbitration Calendar is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. The motion is ordered granted. The case is ordered removed from arbitration. The moving party is to submit a proposed order within 5 days. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 2/24/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212, Jury Trial Date of 7/12/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings not reported. (212)

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiffs Tremblay-Shipway's Motion To Quash Subpoenas is granted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
